title: Expecting empty properties to be returned as null values when creating a MOTOR SHOW
gherkin:
When the user creates a "MOTOR SHOW" "IAA 2017" with the following data
  | key | value | datatype |
  | name | 2017 IAA Frankfurt | string |
Then the response should contain the following properties
  | key | value | datatype |
  | name | 2017 IAA Frankfurt | string |
  | date_from |  | string |
  | date_until |  | string |
  | location |  | string |
  | target_audience |  | string |
  | focus |  | string |
